title: hieracium carpathicum subsp. engleri
intro: Hieracium carpathicum subsp. engleri is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the Daisy family and native to mountainous regions of Eastern Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium carpathicum subsp. engleri are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, Hieracium carpathicum subsp. engleri is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate various health issues, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
